items.briefing:
A ransomware group known as INC is causing widespread damage by exploiting simple security gaps — things like weak passwords and unpatched systems — rather than sophisticated techniques. This is a reminder that basic cyber hygiene remains critical. Separately, over 30,000 Fortinet network devices worldwide have been compromised in a large credential-harvesting campaign, meaning attackers may already hold login details for affected organisations. If your workplace uses Fortinet products, check with your IT team that they are fully patched and credentials have been reset.

**Practical tip:** Ask your IT team today whether any Fortinet devices in your organisation have been updated and whether passwords have been recently changed.

featured.title: Mackay Sugar cyber attack flagged as broader risk to Australia’s food supply chain
featured.quote: Major Australian food exporter hit by cyber attack, exposing critical supply chain vulnerability.
